rationale: Two replications filed: (1) fred_indpro on 2026-04-14 (γ=0.94, AR(1)-non-separable, hypothesized); (2) binance_btcusdt_1h on 2026-04-14 (γ≈0, r²≈0.001, white-noise spectrum, all nulls indistinguishable, hypothesized). Both honest negative findings that narrow the market-lane γ-claim. Bumped 1→2 in the same PR that added the BTCUSDT entry per filing protocol.
